steps.title: Find the line from the table
steps.content: Use the table points directly. From $(0,38)$ to $(1,43)$, the slope is $m=\frac{43-38}{1-0}=5.$ Since the point with $x=0$ has $y=38$, the y-intercept is $38$.

steps.title: Match the choices
steps.content: The line is $f(x)=5x+38$. Choice D has the same y-intercept but slope 48, so it is much too steep. Choices A and C have different intercepts. Therefore choice B is correct.
